mapper.sql: select lesson_id, unit_id, lesson_name, lesson_order, lesson_type, content, duration, is_free, is_preview, experience_reward, coin_reward, passing_score, max_attempts, resources, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag from edu_course_lesson
mapper.insert: insert into edu_course_lesson ( unit_id, lesson_name, lesson_order, lesson_type, content, duration, is_free, is_preview, experience_reward, coin_reward, passing_score, max_attempts, resources, create_by, create_time, del_flag ) values ( #{unitId}, #{lessonName}, #{lessonOrder}, #{lessonType}, #{content}, #{duration}, #{isFree}, #{isPreview}, #{experienceReward}, #{coinReward}, #{passingScore}, #{maxAttempts}, #{resources}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), '0' )
mapper.delete: update edu_course_lesson set del_flag = '1' where lesson_id = #{lessonId}

update edu_course_lesson set del_flag = '1' where lesson_id in
#{lessonId}
